ham.subject: June Newsletter: Exclusive Deals Inside!
ham.body:
Hello valued customer,

Welcome to our June Newsletter! We are excited to bring you the latest deals and updates. Here are a few highlights:

- New product launch: Smartwatch X – 20% off for the first 100 customers.
- Exclusive offer: Buy 2 get 1 free on all accessories.
- Upcoming webinar: Mastering Digital Marketing – free registration.

For more details, visit <URL>.

Thank you for being part of our community.

Best regards,
The Marketing Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Microsoft 365 Password Expiry – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Hi John,

This is a security alert from Microsoft 365 Admin Team. Aapka password expire hone wala hai on 2026-04-20. If you do not update within 48 hours, aapka access suspended ho jayega and critical emails/files lost ho sakte hain. Please verify your account by clicking the link below and entering your current password to confirm your identity.

<URL>

If you ignore this, Microsoft will automatically reset your password and lock your account. Apologies for inconvenience.

Thank you,
Microsoft 365 Security
